name: Unification of Japan: Kanto Edition
overview: After a Kyowakai member is killed, detectives Shima and Hayami investigate the case, which is connected to recent unsolved murders. Kyowakai also launches their own investigation to avenge their comrade, intertwining their efforts with the police. The case involves a large organization framing Kyowakai.

trailers.title: 【公式予告編】『日本統一 関東編5』2023年8月25日レンタルDVDリリース
